title: Where Is Sleepy Yuki?
synopsis: Little Yuki plays peek-a-boo while getting ready for bedtime, hiding behind curtains, under blankets, and in cozy places before finally settling down to sleep.

pages.text: Where is Yuki? It's time for bed! Is she behind the big blue curtain? Peek-a-boo! There she is!

illustration.description: A little girl with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes peeking out from behind a partially open blue curtain in a cozy bedroom, her face showing with a playful smile

pages.text: Now where did Yuki go? Is she under the soft yellow blanket on her bed? Peek-a-boo! Found you!

illustration.description: A girl with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes hiding under a yellow blanket with just her eyes and hair visible, creating a peek-a-boo moment on a small bed

pages.text: Yuki loves to hide! Is she behind the teddy bear? Peek-a-boo! There's her giggling face!

illustration.description: A child with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes crouched behind a large brown teddy bear, with part of her face and hair showing around the bear's side

pages.text: Time to sleep now, little Yuki. She snuggles in her bed, pulls up her blanket, and closes her eyes. Goodnight, Yuki! Sweet dreams!

illustration.description: A peaceful girl with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes lying in bed with eyes closed, tucked under a cozy blanket with stars on it, moonlight streaming through window

metadata.illustrationStyle: lift the flap inspired, partially hidden objects, peek-a-boo composition, hiding and revealing, interactive feel, surprise element, behind the curtain, playful concealment

questions.question: Where did Yuki hide first?
questions.explanation: Yuki first hid behind the big blue curtain!

questions.question: What color was Yuki's blanket?
questions.explanation: The blanket was soft and yellow!

questions.question: What did Yuki hide behind last?
questions.explanation: Yuki hid behind the brown teddy bear and giggled!
